properties.description: UAV 안전장치 파라미터 변조 탐지. 공격자가 MAVLink로 ARMING_CHECK/FS_*/BRD_SAFETYENABLE/SIM_GPS_* 파라미터를 변경해 안전장치 무력화 또는 GNSS 스푸핑 시도 탐지. UAVConfigAudit_CL 기반. MITRE ICS ATT&CK: T0836·T0839 / EMB3D 파라미터변조
properties.query:
let DangerousParams = dynamic([
    "ARMING_CHECK",
    "FS_GCS_ENABL",
    "FS_THR_ENABLE",
    "FS_BATT_ENABLE",
    "BRD_SAFETYENABLE",
    "SIM_GPS_DISABLE",
    "SIM_GPS_GLITCH_X",
    "SIM_GPS_GLITCH_Y",
    "SIM_GPS_GLITCH_Z"
]);
UAVConfigAudit_CL
| where UAVId startswith "MUAV-AKS-SYS"
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where EventType == "param_changed"
| where ParamId in (DangerousParams)
| extend TriggerReason = case(
    ParamId == "ARMING_CHECK" and ParamValueAfter == 0, "Arming_Safety_Disabled",
    ParamId startswith "FS_" and ParamValueAfter == 0, "Failsafe_Disabled",
    ParamId == "BRD_SAFETYENABLE" and ParamValueAfter == 0, "HW_Safety_Disabled",
    ParamId startswith "SIM_GPS_", "GNSS_Spoof_Param_Changed",
    "Dangerous_Param_Changed"
)
| extend DetectionDetail = strcat(
    "ParamId:", ParamId,
    "|Before:", ParamValueBefore,
    "|After:", ParamValueAfter,
    "|Source:", Source
)
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    UAVId,
    TriggerReason,
    DetectionDetail,
    ParamId,
    ParamValueBefore,
    ParamValueAfter
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
